proposals.answer: Enterprise admins cannot manage their own user seats; every change is a support ticket with a 1-3 business-day turnaround, so new hires wait days for access.
proposals.hint: Stated directly in the brief; confirm turnaround SLA with support to raise confidence.
The sources contain no performance/latency/SLA data. Needs investigation with engineering — do NOT assume a number. Routed to discovery for the orchestrator.
